audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: Haystack 3.0: Agents with hooks, skills, and built-in introspection. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 2: The Washing-Machine Tragedy, by Stanisław Lem (1963). Relevant to RAG & Retrieval. Matched RAG & Retrieval on: rag. Read it through that lens. Item 3: What if your AI agent could have its own WhatsApp number?. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 4: Surgical DevOps – Prevent LLM context drift and regressions. Relevant to Evaluation & Observability. Matched Evaluation & Observability on: drift. Read it through that lens. Item 5: Controlling Reasoning Effort in LLMs. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 6: Watching AI agents build a new business. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens.
